title: Cog & Steam
description: ⚙️ Cog & Steam is a steampunk-inspired modpack built around Create, where you design stunning machines, automate everything, and build a world powered by gears, steam, and imagination. 💡🔥
body:
# **⚙️ Cog & Steam**
💡 A Steampunk Create Modpack for Inventors, Tinkerers, and Dreamers

Step into a world powered by gears, steam, and your imagination. Cog & Steam is a carefully crafted modpack centered around the incredible Create mod—where automation isn’t just efficient, it’s beautiful.

Whether you're building piston-powered trains through the mountains or designing intricate factory systems with rotating shafts and cogwheels, this pack gives you the tools to turn creativity into kinetic energy. 💥

## 🔍 What Makes Cog & Steam Tick?

### 🛠️ Create-Powered Engineering
Design conveyor lines, crushing wheels, flying machines, and more using the Create mod’s visually satisfying mechanics.

### 🌄 A Beautiful World to Build In
With enhanced world generation, lush biomes, and handcrafted structures, exploration is just as rewarding as automation.
### 
### 🎨 Rustic & Steampunk Aesthetics
Gorgeous resource packs and decor mods set the perfect vibe for a world of brass pipes, wood beams, and iron giants.

### 🧠 Built for Builders & Thinkers
No magic, no grindy tech trees—just clever contraptions, satisfying problem-solving, and space to create.

### 🌐 Multiplayer Ready
Optimized for both solo engineers and co-op building with friends. Host a server and build your steam-powered empire together! 💼👷‍♀️

### ⚡ Smooth Performance
Lightweight and optimized, so your machines run as smoothly as they look—even on modest setups.

### 🎁 Intergrated Server
Coming soon, we'll have our own multiplayer server for everyone to play on.

### 🎩 No spells. No dragons. Just steam, steel, and smarts.
If you love machines that move, contraptions that click, and builds that feel alive, then Cog & Steam is your next obsession. Jump in, fire up the engine, and start crafting a world that runs on genius. 🔩🔥
